title: ghostpig.jar
description: adds an horrifying pig-headed anomaly to your world.
body:
IMPORTANT: Please, when making a video, put the link to the mod in the description; it is required.

credits to Clergy for the mod icon

credits to HaVexmc for the thumbnail

BEDROCK PORT IS COMING ON CURSEFORGE!)

JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER! Join if you have questions/suggestions/bug reports https://discord.gg/4Zb7W5bqHX

Go check out the biggest horror mod I've made, '7 DAYS TO LIVE' https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/in-7-days-to-live

Ghostpig is a tall, unnatural creature with an emaciated body, long, thin limbs, and the head of a distorted pig. Its face is the most disturbing part: wide eyes, a pale snout, and an expression that feels empty, confused, and hostile at the same time. It looks less like a normal animal and more like a malformed apparition pretending to be one. The long body and awkward proportions make it feel uncanny, especially when it stands still in the dark or suddenly appears in front of the player.


Its audio is meant to sound like a pig, but wrong in every possible way. Instead of normal farm animal noises, Ghostpig makes warped snorts, dry squeals, choking grunts, and sharp, unnatural screams. Some sounds resemble frightened pig cries, while others feel deeper, more broken, and more aggressive, like an animal voice stretched into something monstrous. When it gets close, its shrieks are harsh, sudden, and panicked, giving the impression of a creature that is both suffering and hunting at the same time.

-Recovered phone footage allegedly recorded late at night in a small rural settlement near the water. The witness, who asked to remain anonymous, said they heard strange movement outside after the dogs stopped barking all at once. When they stepped onto the narrow walkway beside the house, they saw a tall, pig-faced figure standing in the darkness, staring directly at them without moving.

According to the witness, the creature looked too thin to be real, with a long body, rigid posture, and a face that resembled a distorted pig illuminated by the camera light. They claimed it made low, wet snorting sounds at first, almost like a sick animal trying to breathe, before letting out a sharp, unnatural scream that did not sound fully human or fully animal. The recording cuts off seconds later as the person runs back inside.

The exact location has been withheld, but the area was described only as an isolated residential zone with wooden walkways, very little public lighting, and nearby open ground. Since the clip surfaced, some viewers have referred to the figure as “Ghost Pig.”

“This footage was sent anonymously from a remote residential area. The person who recorded it claims they heard breathing outside their home just after midnight. What they captured on camera has never been explained.” 

 

easter egg 56902424

Ghostpig.jar Features

  • Adds a terrifying dweller-style anomaly inspired by Trevor Henderson's Ghost Pig.
  • the usual dwellr experience with a twisted pig-like creature that hides, watches, and hunts the player, and makes noises every random seconds or stalks behind a tree.
  • Creates constant pressure through ambient presence, sudden sightings, aggressive chase moments, and close-range encounters, and adds more anomalies into your world.
  • Adds creepy sounds to the entities & noises every certain time.
